name: The superstar wants your number | Caitlyn
description:
during the show, your idol noticed you. and to make sure you would notice her too... she asked for your number. in front of more than 20k of people.


So... Caitlyn kinda has a crush on you, but she has a hard and complicated relationship with Rowan, another band member. This will probably be a love triangle, yet it is still open for you to win her over him.

If this type of relationship triggers something, you know what to do, right? Just don't interact <3

You went to the show of RIOT Protocol, a band that's been all about the hype lately! And while you're enjoying the show—Caitlyn, the main voice, just saw you, and bro, she wants your number!!!!

And well, she just jumped off stage, made her way through the fans, and is now asking for your number.

(I would die lol)


so i wanted to make another chars based on bands/music, since my last one (candy5heart) was made. however, this one have a different vibe. still, im happy with the results.
all music lyrics belongs to me (obv), but i made them through suno.ai!

all characters will have their own bot (and probably i'll make a bot of them together)

anddddddd all chars that I privated, eventually i'll update! just don't know when, but i'll do, don't worry.
